commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a two-phase Gateway WebSocket handshake timeout with a connect-auth watchdog, focused gateway tests, protocol docs, and a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +222, Docs +8. Total +285 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but not from a live run. The PR head arms the watchdog before awaiting auth while `getClient()` remains null, and the arm helper clears/replaces the existing timer, so repeated valid `connect` frames can extend the deadline.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair is feasible: fix the duplicate-connect watchdog reset, add the missing regression, remove the changelog edit, and refresh the conflicted branch or replacement.

target.title: fix(gateway): bound websocket auth after valid connect
target.body:
Repair contributor PR #49751 in place.

Plan:
- Rebase the existing branch onto current main 381c2e1d1a3bbc5c41383e6d66b094bbdf3a6bf0.
- Keep clearing the preauth timer only after a valid connect frame is received.
- Keep a bounded connect-auth watchdog so stalled auth cannot leave sockets open indefinitely.
- Confirm the old client.ts connectDelayMs clamp review finding is obsolete against the current branch, or remove that behavior if it reappears.
- Run Codex /review, address every finding, then run pnpm check:changed plus the focused gateway Vitest command.

Credit: based on @sashakhar1's original PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/49751, with ProjectClownfish repair commits preserving the contributor path.

ProjectClownfish replacement details:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-156675-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/49751
- Credit: Preserve @sashakhar1 as the original contributor for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/49751.; Keep Vincent Koc's ProjectClownfish repair commits credited in branch history and PR discussion.; Any changelog or merge note should credit the source PR and explain that ProjectClownfish repaired the original contributor branch rather than replacing it.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed; pnpm -s vitest run --config vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/handshake-timeouts.test.ts src/gateway/server.auth.default-token.suite.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.post-connect-health.test.ts
- Repair fallback: To https://github.com/sashakhar1/openclaw.git
 ! [remote rejected]       HEAD -> fix/ws-handshake-timeout-loopback-token-auth (refusing to allow a GitHub App to create or update workflow `.github/workflows/ci.yml` without `workflows` permission)
